---
title: "We Are Different And We Are Similar"
subtitle: "Universals, Commonality, Diversity and Variation In Parenting and Child Development"
author:  Andy Grogan-Kaylor 
date: "2026-4-7"
categories: [multilevel, corporal punishment, positive parenting, MICS]
image: "positiveparenting.png"
draft: false
---

Slides from a talk that I gave this week.

"We Are Different And We Are Similar: Universals, Commonality, Diversity and Variation In Parenting and Child Development"

[https://agrogan1.github.io/positive-and-negative-parenting/positive-and-negative-parenting-revealjs.html](https://agrogan1.github.io/positive-and-negative-parenting/positive-and-negative-parenting-revealjs.html)

```{r}

knitr::include_url("https://agrogan1.github.io/positive-and-negative-parenting/positive-and-negative-parenting-revealjs.html")

```
